title: GoalRemovedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `goal_removed` event — goal deleted via user command or yaml pruning. See spec/goal-lifecycle-v1.md §5.5.

routine_id.description: Source routine id when the removal was yaml-pruned.

reason.description: Free-text rationale (e.g. `"yaml_pruned"` or a user reason).
